message:
test(e2e): improve snapshot panel test selectors with data-testid

Add data-testid attribute to SnapshotSummaryPanel and update E2E tests to
use more robust selectors that are resilient to DOM structure changes.

Changes to SnapshotSummaryPanel.tsx:
- Add data-testid="snapshot-summary-panel" to root motion.div element
- Enables reliable E2E test targeting independent of CSS classes

Changes to snapshot.spec.ts:
- Use page.getByTestId("snapshot-summary-panel") as scoping container
- Update header card selector to scope within panel
- Replace .status-pill selector with getByText for status message
- Use getByRole("heading") for section headers (Safety Tools, Work Queue)
- More resilient to styling changes while maintaining test intent

These changes follow Playwright best practices:
- Prefer user-facing attributes (testid, role, text) over implementation details
- Scope selectors to reduce flakiness from unrelated DOM changes
- Explicit visibility assertions for critical UI elements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
